title: AttachedManagedPolicyList
description: AttachedManagedPolicyList schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: The name of the AWS managed policy.
The ARN of the AWS managed policy. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.

items.description: A structure that stores the details of the AWS managed policy.
